reviews.comment:
Todo excelente. Agus para mate gratis y lugar para lavar el mate. Los empleados súper atentos.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was excellent. Agus provided free mate and a place to wash the mate gourd. The staff were super attentive.

reviews.comment:
Parada fácil. Baños limpios, el café es horrible, extremadamente caliente y con sabor quemado. la atención es todo menos amable

(Translated by Google)
Easy stop. Clean restrooms, but the coffee is awful—extremely hot and burnt. The service is anything but friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKMnItbTdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio. Los baños limpios. Y buenisimo que tienen empanadas de comida

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Clean restrooms. And it's great that they have empanadas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKeXFqREhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicio tiene mucho estacionamiento y una linda plazita atrás  para poder estirar un poco las piernas después de un viaje largo...y el agua para el mate era gratis cosa que no pasa seguido...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station with plenty of parking and a nice little plaza in the back where you can stretch your legs after a long trip...and the hot water for mate was free, which doesn't happen often...

reviewReply.comment: muchas gracias por visitarnos los esperamos nuevamente
